name: Super Fox
short_description: ​​Embody the agile fox and embark on an interstellar journey!​​ Leap through retro pixel worlds, gather starlight to summon mysterious black holes, and warp to fantastical planets with wildly distinct aesthetics. With meticulously crafted platforming stages and charmingly animated moves
detailed_description:
A Challenging and Fun Platformer Game​​

Players embody an adorable fox embarking on a thrilling adventure in a mystical forest illuminated by starlight. Navigate through 170 meticulously designed levels filled with diverse traps and creatures, offering over an hour of gameplay

Story Setting:​​

The adventure unfolds in the ​​Starry Sky Forest​​, where trees and plants glow softly under celestial light. Distant stars and planets float in the night sky, creating a dreamlike atmosphere. As the fox protagonist, players collect stardust fragments to unlock ​​black holes​​ that teleport them to new zones

Controls:​​
Keyboard:
←→/A/D - Move
Space - Jump

Gamepad:
Left Stick - Move
A - Jump
B - Back
LB - Toggle Timer
RB - Toggle Level Loop
